$comment: Versioned, immutable release URL (git tag v2.9.0); 'main' carries the latest. See GOVERNANCE.md. Asset definitions are $ref'd from skel.schema.json so embedded snapshots and registry records can never drift apart. Validators must load both schemas.
title: SKEL Studio Registry
description: The studio registry (studio.json) — the story bible. Canonical, cross-project home of characters, environments, locations, props, voices, skins, palettes, and series. SKEL documents reference these assets by ID; on export, hosts copy referenced records into the document as embedded snapshots. See studio-spec.md for precedence and snapshot rules.

studio_version.description: Version of the studio registry format. Follows the SKEL spec version; current: 1.0.

studio_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this studio/workspace.

modified_at.description: Registry-level modification timestamp. Snapshot/registry conflicts resolve by the newer modified_at (see studio-spec.md §4).

characters.description: Canonical character records. Same definition as embedded snapshots in .skel documents.

environments.description: Canonical environment records (dressed/lit variants of locations).

audio_assets.description: Canonical audio asset records referenced by sound_effects, music_cues, and environments' soundscape_refs.

voices.description: Casting/TTS voice registry. Character.voice.voice_settings may reference a registry voice by voice_ref instead of repeating provider settings.

skins.description: Visual style presets. metadata.skin_key in a .skel document resolves to a skin id here.

palettes.description: Named color palettes referenced by skins and style tooling.

series.description: Series documents: seasons, episode index, arcs, and shared cast. metadata.series.series_id in an episode .skel resolves here.

extensions.description: Vendor-namespaced extension data. Keys MUST start with 'x-'.

Skin.description: A reusable visual style preset. The resolution target of metadata.skin_key.

id.description: The skin key referenced by metadata.skin_key (e.g. noir_v1).

style_text.description: Canonical style prompt text injected by style-aware BONEs. The style analogue of identity_lock/style_lock.

palette_ref.description: Palette id from the palettes collection.

v_setup_defaults.description: Default v_setup token values this skin implies (e.g. light: noir, color: desaturated, texture: film_35mm).

Series.description: A show: its seasons, episode index, arcs, and shared cast. Episode .skel files point back here via metadata.series.

format.description: limited = fixed episode count; ongoing = open-ended; anthology = standalone episodes sharing a frame.

arcs.description: Story arcs spanning episodes. Episodes advance arcs via metadata.series.arc_refs.

cast_refs.description: Character IDs from this registry's characters collection shared across the series. The cross-episode identity-lock guarantee: one cast, many stories.

episode_code.description: Display code such as S01E03. MUST match the episode document's metadata.series.episode_code.

project_slug.description: Host project slug where the episode's .skel lives.

status.description: Free-form episode status label (e.g. outlined, boarded, rendering, delivered).

spans.description: episode_codes this arc covers, in order.
